channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-05-15 19:20 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 just open-sourced its For You algorithm. This is one of the biggest transparency moves from any so...
item.description: 𝕏 just open-sourced its For You algorithm. This is one of the biggest transparency moves from any social platform. Here’s the Grok breakdown:

item.title: @elonmusk: Critique of the 𝕏 algorithm is welcome. There will be monthly updates of the latest algorithm to Git...
item.description: Critique of the 𝕏 algorithm is welcome. There will be monthly updates of the latest algorithm to GitHub with release notes. As reminder, you can always choose no algorithm via the Following tab.

item.title: @elonmusk: Only 𝕏 is open, the other social media companies manipulate the results behind closed doors
item.description: Only 𝕏 is open, the other social media companies manipulate the results behind closed doors

item.title: @elonmusk: Beware the empathy exploit. Empathy is good and right when thought through (deep), but can be deadly...
item.description: Beware the empathy exploit. Empathy is good and right when thought through (deep), but can be deadly to civilization when simply stimulus-response (shallow). For example, releasing a repeat violent offender may feel good at first (shallow empathy for the criminal), but it is wrong to do so when that person will go on to hurt or murder innocent victims, as there should be deep empathy for future victims.

item.title: @elonmusk: Who specifically is the asshole who added DEI lies to Academy Awards eligibility instead of it just ...
item.description: Who specifically is the asshole who added DEI lies to Academy Awards eligibility instead of it just being about making the best movie?

item.title: @elonmusk: Obviously. Sometimes grown men send me their Instagram profiles and I’m like are you transitioning o...
item.description: Obviously. Sometimes grown men send me their Instagram profiles and I’m like are you transitioning or what?

item.title: @elonmusk: By far the most embarrassing thing about this is that the hedge fund guy was using the MOST CRINGE w...
item.description: By far the most embarrassing thing about this is that the hedge fund guy was using the MOST CRINGE website on the entire Internet for milf sex 😬xcancel.com/i/grok/share/4c2a52a14…

item.title: @elonmusk: Doing this against the native population’s will is ethnic cleansing, by the way.
item.description: Doing this against the native population’s will is ethnic cleansing, by the way.

item.title: @elonmusk: 𝕏 is the mind of humanity
item.description: 𝕏 is the mind of humanity

item.title: @elonmusk: There is hope, but there must be change
item.description: There is hope, but there must be change

item.title: @elonmusk: 60% of violent criminals are re-imprisoned for new crimes within just a few years of their release S...
item.description: 60% of violent criminals are re-imprisoned for new crimes within just a few years of their release Shallow empathy prioritizes the criminal over their victims Deep empathy prioritizes victims over the criminal

item.title: @elonmusk: Most airlines are partnering with@Starlink. The others will have terrible WiFi and lose customers as...
item.description: Most airlines are partnering with@Starlink. The others will have terrible WiFi and lose customers as a result.

item.title: @elonmusk: Chris Nolan desecrated the Odyssey so that he would be eligible for an Academy Award …
item.description: Chris Nolan desecrated the Odyssey so that he would be eligible for an Academy Award …

item.title: @elonmusk: X is the most powerful platform in the world. Today, the Prime Minister of India himself used X to f...
item.description: X is the most powerful platform in the world. Today, the Prime Minister of India himself used X to fact-check a major news claim and directly tell people the truth. That’s the power of X. X is not just a social media app. It is the world’s real-time public square.

item.title: @elonmusk: So shameful of Rubin. All that should matter is the quality of the movie.
item.description: So shameful of Rubin. All that should matter is the quality of the movie.

item.title: @elonmusk: Nolan’s Odyssey Problem: Diversity Without Greeks Is Not Diversitygreekcitytimes.com/2026/05/1…
item.description: Nolan’s Odyssey Problem: Diversity Without Greeks Is Not Diversitygreekcitytimes.com/2026/05/1…

item.title: @elonmusk: The goal of the 𝕏 algorithm is simple: show each user the content they are most likely to find inter...
item.description: The goal of the 𝕏 algorithm is simple: show each user the content they are most likely to find interesting, limited only by the laws within a given jurisdiction. No thumb on the scale. Doesn’t mean we achieve the goal, but that is what I tell the team.
